title: case ranges should not be empty
description: "case" ranges should not be emptyAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBuggnuWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoThe GNU compiler gives the possibility to specify a range of consecutive values in acaselabel, for example:case: 1 ... 5.However, if the values are written in decreasing order, i.e., from the larger value to the smaller one, the range will evaluate as empty. So thecasebody will never be executed.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
